mission.title: kubeflow: Refactor kfctl to begin address a number of issues related to repo management
mission.description:
* kfctl needs to support multiple repositories since the configuration is
  now split across kubeflow/kubeflow and kubeflow/manifests

* We should use KfDef.Status to pass information through the kfctl libraries
  that is temporary such as keeping track of locations where code is cached.

  * Prior to this repo the fields Repo and ManifestsRepo were reset to
    point to the local cachedir. This means those links were no longer valid
    if the app was moved to a different folder or machine

  * With this PR we add Spec.Repos to keep track of source of truth
    and Status.ReposCache to store information about the local cache

    * This way the app can always rebuild the cache if needed.

* Use hashicorp's go-getter to provide a consistent syntax for downloading the
  repos. go-getter supports fetching URIs and specifying lots of variants (e.g pull) no need to invent our own syntax.

* Define a SyncCache method on KfDef that will sync multiple repositories.

* Refactor NewKfApp; split

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
